name: Sarah Nutri - Quora Draft Intake -> Discord Review

parameters.jsCode:
const products = [
  {
    "slug": "hydration-electrolytes",
    "name": "Senior-friendly hydration support",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/hydration",
    "match_keywords": [
      "hydration",
      "dehydrated",
      "electrolyte",
      "cramps",
      "water"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person is asking about hydration habits, mild dehydration prevention, or staying hydrated during heat or low appetite.",
    "avoid_when": "The person reports confusion, fainting, severe illness, kidney disease, heart failure, or medication changes."
  },
  {
    "slug": "protein-shake",
    "name": "Easy protein nutrition shake",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/protein-shake",
    "match_keywords": [
      "protein",
      "appetite",
      "muscle",
      "weak",
      "weight loss",
      "meal replacement"
    ],
    "use_when": "The question is about low appetite, simple protein intake, or maintaining muscle with aging.",
    "avoid_when": "The person has kidney disease, unexplained weight loss, swallowing problems, or needs medical nutrition therapy."
  },
  {
    "slug": "fiber-support",
    "name": "Gentle fiber support",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/fiber",
    "match_keywords": [
      "constipation",
      "fiber",
      "regular",
      "digestion",
      "bowel"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person asks about simple food and routine support for occasional constipation.",
    "avoid_when": "The person reports blood, severe pain, bowel obstruction risk, sudden major bowel changes, or unexplained weight loss."
  },
  {
    "slug": "mobility-bands",
    "name": "Light resistance bands",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/resistance-bands",
    "match_keywords": [
      "mobility",
      "walking",
      "strength",
      "exercise",
      "balance",
      "chair exercise"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person asks about gentle strength, balance, or simple home movement for older adults.",
    "avoid_when": "The person has acute injury, falls, severe pain, fracture concern, or needs physical therapy clearance."
  },
  {
    "slug": "sleep-routine",
    "name": "Sleep routine support kit",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/sleep",
    "match_keywords": [
      "sleep",
      "insomnia",
      "night",
      "routine",
      "tired"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person asks about sleep hygiene, bedtime routine, or non-medical sleep habits.",
    "avoid_when": "The person mentions sedatives, sleep apnea, confusion, falls, medication interactions, or severe depression."
  }
];
const input = $json.body || $json;
const title = input.title || 'How can an older adult improve daily nutrition safely?';
const url = input.url || '';
const body = input.body || input.text || 'General senior nutrition question.';
const prompt = "You are drafting a Quora answer for Sarah Nutri.\n\nThe answer should be higher effort than a Reddit comment: clear structure, practical steps, and a calm healthy-aging tone. Do not post directly from automation. Produce a draft for manual review.\n\nHard rules:\n- General education only, not medical diagnosis.\n- Include a clinician/registered dietitian caveat when the question is condition-specific.\n- Use product links sparingly and only when directly relevant.\n- Include an affiliate disclosure when a link is used.\n- Avoid repetitive templates.\n\nReturn strict JSON only:\n{\n  \"safety\": \"answer|human_review|emergency|skip\",\n  \"affiliate_allowed\": false,\n  \"selected_product_slug\": null,\n  \"answer\": \"final Quora draft answer\",\n  \"reason\": \"short internal reason\"\n}\n" + '\n\nQuora question context:\n' + JSON.stringify({ title, url, body }, null, 2) + '\n\nProduct catalog:\n' + JSON.stringify(products, null, 2) + '\n\nReturn strict JSON only.';
return [{ json: { platform: 'quora', title, url, body, products, prompt } }];

assignments.name: discordMessage
